query: SELECT id, name, email, company, status, leadSource, budgetRange, createdAt FROM leads WHERE leadSource = 'phone_call' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3u5F3XZPfiBR6CY.root --database jiUKWZNCEesKEKgdJkoZwj --execute SELECT id, name, email, company, status, leadSource, budgetRange, createdAt FROM leads WHERE leadSource = 'phone_call' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
